ts-todo-oracle.notes: Fast iteration benchmark for code-editing loops and regression drift checks.

node-api-oracle.notes: Primary validation benchmark for Node API contract quality.

python-ai-stdlib-oracle.notes: Cross-language regression benchmark without external dependencies.

ts-csv-oracle.notes: TypeScript CSV oracle benchmark for raw-pass contract stability without deterministic fallback dependence.

node-project-api-large.notes: Large multi-file Node API scenario; promoted to blocking after 3 consecutive 100% gate passes (20/20 runs, 2026-03-15).
